DiagnosisText.html.source:
This section asks who provided {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP diagnosis and what diagnostic procedures they used to arrive at their conclusion.

You may have seen multiple vets about {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP symptoms. Please answer the question about the vet who provided the definitive diagnosis, i.e., the one you used to make decisions about {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP.

DiagnosisWho.title.source: Which veterinary professional provided you with the definitive LP/GOLPP diagnosis:

DiagnosticType.title.source: What diagnostic procedure was used to arrive at the definitive diagnosis?

DiagnosticType.choices.SCOPE.text.source: Video endoscope or laryngoscope under anesthesia

DiagnosisStage.title.source: Was {CmpnName} diagnosed with unilateral or bilateral LP?

DiagnosisStage.choices.WASNT_TOLD.text.source: I wasn't told what stage {CmpnName}'s LP was in

DiagnosisTimeAfterSymptoms.title.source: About how long after {CmpnName}'s first symptoms appeared did you get the diagnosis?:

DiagnosisTimeAfterSymptoms.choices.SIX_T.source: Between six months and a year

DiagnosisCost.title.source: What was the pre-insurance cost of the diagnosis?

DiagnosisSurgeonContingent.title.source: Did the surgeon perform the diagnosis without requiring surgery afterwards?

DiagnosisSurgeonContingent.description.source: In other words, did the surgeon refuse to do the diagnosis unless you agreed to go straight to surgery if the results were positive?

DiagnosisSurgeonContingent.choices.YES.t.source: Yes, required surgery consent before diagnosis

DiagnosisSurgeonContingent.choices.NO.te.source: No, did not require surgery consent for diagnosis
